mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.w_en, e.w_zh, e.w_phonetic, e.w_audio, e.w_memo_skill, e.w_unit, e.w_mold, (select count(ew.id) from e_words ew where ew.w_mold = #{wMold}) as type_total_number, eud.today_studied_words_number, eud.each_day_word_number, learned.learned_type_word_number FROM e_words e JOIN ( SELECT eud.u_id, eud.now_day_num + 1 AS today_studied_words_number, eud.each_day_num AS each_day_word_number FROM e_user_data eud WHERE eud.u_id = #{uId} ) eud ON eud.u_id = #{uId} JOIN ( SELECT es.u_id, es.s_mold, COUNT(0) AS learned_type_word_number FROM e_studied es WHERE es.u_id = #{uId} GROUP BY es.u_id, es.s_mold ) learned ON learned.u_id = #{uId} AND learned.s_mold = #{wMold} LEFT JOIN e_studied es ON es.u_id = #{uId} AND es.w_id = e.id WHERE es.w_id IS NULL AND e.w_mold = #{wMold} ORDER BY e.w_unit LIMIT 1
select * from e_words w where w.id in (select s.w_id from e_studied s where s.u_id = #{uId} and s.s_memo_date = #{date}) order by w.id
select count(total) from (select count(w_unit) as total from e_words where w_mold = #{w_mold} group by w_unit) as ewc
